headline: President Xi Jinping Has Promised China Will Buy 200 Boeing 737s. Here Is One More Big Reason the Stock Is a Buy in 2026.
summary: Boeing is on the comeback trail, but it still has work to do to convince investors that its operational issues are fully behind it.

headline: Why Did South Korea Just Order $4.2 Billion in Military Helicopters From Boeing and Lockheed?
summary: Lockheed Martin will earn more than Boeing on its South Korean arms deal.
